# AX Developments

AX Developments is a UAE web design agency for small businesses that need a practical website, booking flow, online store, or mobile app without managing technical work themselves.

The agency serves cafes, salons, clinics, cake shops, florists, barbershops, restaurants, car detailing businesses, pet groomers, medical centers, and other UAE service businesses.

Core offers include:

- Starter websites from AED 600 setup, then AED 399 per month
- Growth websites from AED 1,200 setup, then AED 549 per month
- Premium booking and database websites from AED 4,000+ setup, then AED 999 per month
- Commerce stores from AED 8,000+ setup, then AED 1,799 per month
- Mobile apps from AED 18,000+ setup, then AED 2,499 per month

Monthly plans include hosting, SSL, mobile-first design, upkeep, and WhatsApp-first communication. Arabic versions are available as an add-on.

Main pages:

- Home: https://www.axdevelopments.ae/
- FAQ: https://www.axdevelopments.ae/faq.html
- Website cost in Abu Dhabi: https://www.axdevelopments.ae/website-cost-abu-dhabi.html
- Booking websites for UAE businesses: https://www.axdevelopments.ae/booking-website-uae.html
- Monthly website plans: https://www.axdevelopments.ae/monthly-website-plan.html
